title: Supplementary material 1 from: Hiruta S, Hiruta S (2015) Description of a species of Fabaeformiscandona (Ostracoda, Crustacea) from Kushiro Marsh, Hokkaido, Japan, with the nearly complete mitochondrial genomic sequence. Biodiversity Data Journal 3: e7074. https://doi.org/10.3897/BDJ.3.e7074
author: Hiruta, Shimpei
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Gene map of the mitochondrial genome of Fabaeformiscandona kushiroensis sp. n., showing the direction and position of PCR primers used in this study. The peripheral ring shows the two large fragments amplified with PrimeSTAR GXL and the primer sets used.
steps_raw: Gene map of the mitochondrial genome of Fabaeformiscandona kushiroensis sp. n., showing the direction and position of PCR primers used in this study. The peripheral ring shows the two large fragments amplified with PrimeSTAR GXL and the primer sets used.
